title: 🚀 v2.0.0: Agent Guardrails — Enforce safety guardrails on agent actions: permission gates...
content:
Enforce safety guardrails on agent actions: permission gates, allowlists, audit

🆕 v2.0.0 features:
• Advanced CLI with 8+ subcommands
• JSON output for automation
• Built-in self-tests (CI-ready)
• Zero dependencies (Python stdlib)
• Cross-platform (Windows/macOS/Linux)

Free + MIT. Live on ClawHub: https://clawhub.ai/skills/skills/agent-guardrails
GitHub: https://github.com/itsPremkumar/agent-guardrails

#ClawHub #OpenClaw #AIAgent #Python #DevTools
